extra_slides.purpose: 릴스 시작 2초 안에 시선을 붙잡는 충격 훅
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Bold typography design on soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown #3D2B1F Pretendard SemiBold 16pt, no decoration. Center: Massive bold headline in warm brown #3D2B1F Pretendard ExtraBold 72pt: "분유 물 온도" line break "잘못하면" line break "위험해요" Each line centered, strong hierarchy. Bottom small text coral #E05C3A 18pt: "특히 미숙아·저체중아" Minimal clean layout, high readability, urgent tone but warm feel.

extra_slides.purpose: 물을 먼저 넣는 올바른 순서를 실사 클로즈업으로 보여줌
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Close-up photo realistic scene. Adult hand holding baby bottle under running tap water, filling bottle first before powder. Warm kitchen lighting, soft focus background. Top-right overlay: 소아과언니 warm brown small Pretendard SemiBold, semi-transparent. Bottom text overlay warm brown #3D2B1F Pretendard Bold 48pt: "물 먼저" line break "분유 나중" White rounded rectangle background behind text for readability. Clean modern kitchen aesthetic, soft natural light.

Portrait 1080x1350. Close-up photo realistic scene. Baby bottle inside microwave with glowing interior light, shot from front. Large red X mark overlay across entire image semi-transparent. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small Pretendard SemiBold. Center bold text coral #E05C3A Pretendard ExtraBold 56pt: "전자레인지" line break "절대 금지" White rounded rectangle behind text. Dramatic lighting, warning tone but not scary, clear prohibition message.

Portrait 1080x1350. Close-up photo realistic scene. Adult hands washing thoroughly under running water with soap bubbles, side angle view. Warm bathroom lighting, water droplets visible. Top-right overlay: 소아과언니 warm brown small Pretendard SemiBold. Bottom text overlay teal #2C7A5C Pretendard Bold 48pt: "조유 전" line break "손 씻기 필수" White rounded rectangle background behind text. Clean hygienic aesthetic, soft natural light, emphasizing cleanliness.
